---
title: "HEOR & RWE Knowledge Base"
listing:
  contents: 
    - "stat-models/*.qmd"
    - "methods-concepts/*.qmd"
    - "tools/*.qmd"
  type: table # Options: table, default, or grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true # Adds a clickable category sidebar on the right
  filter-ui: true  # Adds a live search bar for your audience
---

Welcome to my HEOR & RWE tracking hub. Use the search bar below or the categories on the right to navigate specific methodologies.
